comments.post_body:
So a thing happened right after my last message😃. I am excited to share today was Day 1 at Amazon. I accepted a role as a Sr Technical Program Manager working with the Project Kuiper Team on the customer terminals. I am super excited for the adventure ahead and want to give a huge shout out to Matt Clark for handing off my resume and getting me in front of the recruiters and to Stephen Huberty Lessard for the advice he has given me over the years on interviewing at Amazon (I finally did it😂). 

I would also like to thank the countless people who reached out to offer support, job leads and advice. Without this network of people who knows what would have happened but I truely do thank each and everyone of you😀. #newjob
comments.context_summary: The commenter is sharing their excitement about starting their new role as a Sr Technical Program Manager at Amazon on the Project Kuiper Team, and is thanking their network for support and advice that helped them land the job. They are responding to their own post announcing their new position and expressing gratitude to specific individuals who assisted them in the process.
